Client-side prototype pollution vulnerabilities
In this section, you'll learn how to find client-side prototype pollution vulnerabilities in the wild. To help solidify your understanding of how these vulnerabilities work, we'll cover how to do this manually, as well as how you can use DOM Invader to automate much of this process.
